L1 L2 L3 L4 L5

L5 — Tabs + Shadow DOM

ARIA tab panel with dynamic content injection and a Shadow DOM custom element. Exercises RISK-005 a11y blind spots + Sentinel tab/shadow perception.

Overview panel

This is the always-visible overview. It is rendered synchronously on page load. Sentinel explore should discover this panel immediately.

Use the tabs above to navigate. Keyboard: ← / → arrow keys move between tabs; Enter / Space activates the focused tab.

Static note: loaded at

Dynamic content

The content block below is injected 600ms after this panel becomes visible (simulates an async data fetch). Sentinel must wait for it or heal when the locator resolves later.

Loading…

Data table

A static data table with sortable headers (UI only, no real sort).

Status
1Alpha92Active
2Beta78Active
3Gamma55Inactive
4Delta88Active
5Epsilon40Inactive

Settings

Sample toggle controls for Sentinel to interact with.

Settings saved.

Shadow DOM Widget — <x-color-picker>

This custom element uses attachShadow({mode:'open'}). Its internal controls (color swatches, hex input, apply button) live inside the shadow root and are invisible to standard document.querySelector. Sentinel must use pierce-locators or evaluate-in-shadow to reach them.

Selected color (reflected from shadow): #ffffff
